question_types.title: Functions and mappings 2B вАФ Mapping Classifications

questions.question: State whether the function f(x) = 5x вАУ 3 with domain {x = 3, 4, 5, 6} is one-to-one or many-to-one.
questions.explanation: Every input in the domain maps to a distinct output in the range.

questions.question: State whether the function g(x) = x¬≤ вАУ 3 with domain {x = вАУ3, вАУ2, вАУ1, 0, 1, 2, 3} is one-to-one or many-to-one.
questions.explanation: Since g(3) = 6 and g(вАУ3) = 6, two different inputs map to the same output.

question_types.title: Functions and mappings 2B вАФ Finding Ranges

questions.question: Find the range of the function f(x) = 5x вАУ 3 with domain {x = 3, 4, 5, 6}.
questions.explanation: Substitute each domain value: f(3)=12, f(4)=17, f(5)=22, f(6)=27.

questions.question: Find the range of the function h(x) = 7 / (4 вАУ 3x) with domain {x = вАУ1, 0, 1}.
questions.explanation: Substitute domain values: h(вАУ1)=7/7=1, h(0)=7/4=1.75, h(1)=7/1=7.

questions.question: Given p(x) = 1 вАУ 3x and q(x) = x/4, find pq(вАУ8).
questions.explanation: q(вАУ8) = вАУ8/4 = вАУ2. p(вАУ2) = 1 вАУ 3(вАУ2) = 1 + 6 = 7. (Correction based on verbatim numbers: 1 - 3(-2) = 7).

questions.question: Given q(x) = x/4 and r(x) = (x вАУ 2)¬≤, find qr(5).
Given f(x) = 4x + 1 and g(x) = x¬≤ вАУ 4, find an expression for fg(x).
Given g(x) = x¬≤ вАУ 4 and h(x) = 1/x, find an expression for gh(x).

question_types.title: Inverse functions 2D вАФ Deriving Inverse Functions

questions.question: Find the inverse of the function f(x) = 10 вАУ x, x вИИ вДЭ.
questions.explanation: Let y = 10 вАУ x, then x = 10 вАУ y. Switching variables gives fвБї¬є(x) = 10 вАУ x.

questions.question: Find the inverse of the function g(x) = x/5, x вИИ вДЭ.
questions.explanation: Let y = x/5, then x = 5y. Switching variables gives gвБї¬є(x) = 5x.

question_types.title: Inverse functions 2D вАФ Function Mapping Analysis

questions.question: For the function f: x вЖ¶ 2x + 3, x вИИ вДЭ, state the range of f(x).
questions.explanation: A linear function with domain вДЭ has a range of all real numbers.

questions.question: Explain why the function g: x вЖ¶ 4 вАУ x, {x вИИ вДЭ, x > 0} is not identical to its inverse.
questions.explanation: While gвБї¬є(x) = 4 - x, the domain of g is x > 0 and the domain of gвБї¬є (the range of g) is x < 4.
